title: Wynn Resorts reaches deal with Las Vegas unions to end strike threat
text: Unions representing hospitality workers in Las Vegas reached a tentative labor agreement with Wynn Resorts (NASDAQ:WYNN) on Friday, averting a strike against major casino operators that would have been crippling to one of the biggest tourist cities in the US.  Financial details of the deal were not immediately available, but the Las Vegas unions said they had secured the largest wage increases ever negotiated in their history, Reuters reported.

title: Tens of thousands of Las Vegas Strip hotel workers may on go strike this month
